queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating effect of lacking a formal checking account on consumer credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default reduction associated with critical or diversified existing credit history profiles.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Empirical assessment of the protective impact of used vehicle financing purposes on credit risk drivers and borrower default likelihood.
